content.full_text:
August 24, 1992

Technical Assistance Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Gentlemen:

I am requesting clarification of filing requirements as they pertain to campaign committees supporting a City recall election. Specifically, is a Campaign Committee formed and reporting at the County level appropriate for a City Recall Election. My concern is that a Recall requires that all circulators and signators must be registered to vote in the City; and a Committee formed at the County level would potentially include contributors from outside the City who would be ineligible to participate in the recall effort.

If you have any questions, or need additional information, please don’t hesitate to call (714) 674-3124 ext. 207.

Sincerely,

VICKI KASAD, CITY CLERK
CITY OF LAKE ELSINORE
